Comfortable Accommodations: Fani&Rozi B&B in Maribor offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and garden views. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and free WiFi.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can relax on the sun terrace or in the garden. The property features a bar, coffee shop, and outdoor seating area. Free WiFi is available throughout.
Delicious Breakfast: A variety of breakfast options are provided, including continental, buffet, Italian, vegetarian, vegan, halal, and gluten-free. Fresh pastries, cheese, fruits, and juice are served daily.
Convenient Location: Located 1.7 km from Maribor Train Station, the B&B is near attractions such as Ehrenhausen Castle (26 km) and Ptuj Golf Course (32 km). An ice-skating rink is also nearby.
